rationale: Educ. Code §18.002 governs Job Corps high school diploma programs and has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemptions. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 18.002. ESTABLISHMENT. (a) A Job Corps training program may establish a high school diploma program to operate public secondary schools at Job Corps facilities throughout the state.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
